matter_summary: Three-founder agreement (vesting with back-credit for 14 months of operating tenure, IP assignment, decision-making, good- and bad-leaver, drag-along/tag-along) and a 12% ESOP plan and implementation for an animation studio preparing for a seed round.

phases.name: Phase I: Founders Agreement
phases.scope_summary: Three-founder agreement covering equity vesting (4-year schedule with 1-year cliff, back-credited for 14 months of tenure), IP assignment, decision-making thresholds, exit provisions (good-leaver/bad-leaver buyback), and drag-along/tag-along.
scope_bullets: Drafting of a three-founder agreement modeling vesting for all three founders with back-credit for 14 months of existing tenure
IP assignment from each founder to the company (existing and going-forward)
Decision-making framework: simple majority for ordinary matters, unanimity for reserved matters (equity issuance, dilution, sale of assets)
Exit provisions including good-leaver and bad-leaver clauses with buyback at fair value or formula price
Drag-along and tag-along provisions to align with seed-round investor expectations
Up to two iterations of revisions based on founder inputs
outcome_bullets: Investor-grade founders agreement that addresses the seed-round red flag
Transparent and modeled vesting outcome for each founder under multiple departure scenarios

phases.name: Phase II: ESOP Plan & Implementation
phases.scope_summary: 12% ESOP plan covering the first cohort of 6–8 grantees, with the legal architecture and operational tooling to scale further as Glyph grows.
scope_bullets: Drafting of ESOP plan covering eligibility, vesting, exercise price determination, plan administration, and treatment on termination
Letter of Grant template covering options granted, exercise price, vesting schedule, expiration, and other key terms
Drafting of board and shareholder resolutions for plan approval and grant of options
MGT-14 filing for the special resolution
Tracking spreadsheet for grant, vesting, and exercise
outcome_bullets: ESOP framework aligned with seed-round investor diligence expectations
Operational tooling for ongoing grant administration and vesting tracking
phases.tat_days: 10 working days (commences in parallel once Phase I is in revisions)

payment_terms: 50% advance to commence work; balance on delivery of each phase.
out_of_pocket_note: Government filing fees (MGT-14 ~INR 600), stamp duty, and applicable taxes are excluded and charged at actuals.
